text_block_list.name: Newscaster
text_block_list.text:
Next up, let's talk this weekend's race that
everyone's been waiting for—the Japanese Oaks!

text_block_list.name: Commentator A
text_block_list.text:
Which Umamusume will take the throne as the
Queen of the Oaks this year? Ah, I just can't wait
to find out!

text_block_list.name: Commentator B
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of the Triple Tiara tour, there's actually
a certain runner I've had my eye on since the Oka
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Commentator A
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You mean Sweep Tosho? Hoo boy, that
interview of hers was really something. She's quite
the character.

text_block_list.name: Commentator B
text_block_list.text:
She's out to change the world with her "racing
magic"! Hehe. I can't help but want to see that
dream of hers come true!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Oh! They're talking about Sweep again!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
She's trending on social media too! I guess that
interview she did after the Oka Sho had a pretty
huge impact after all.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wow! This article says that Sweet Pea's
guaranteed to steal the spotlight at the Japanese
Oaks... That's amazing!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: So she's going to steal the spotlight, is she?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's finally the day of the Japanese Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Phew! All right! Here I go, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day! I'm gonna find the last piece of
the racing magic puzzle and—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Excuse me for interrupting.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What? Who're—oh, it's you. You're running in the
Japanese Oaks today, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Sweep Tosho. Could I talk to you for a minute?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...About what?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: You're the one person I will not lose to!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
You're not making history or changing the world
until you get through me!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
You're not the only Umamusume on the Triple
Tiara tour who deserves the spotlight!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
I've put everything on the line to be standing here
today too. All my hard work, my parents' hopes
and dreams—everything!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
So I'm not letting you be the only one who gets to
talk about her dreams.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
The title of Queen of the Oaks is going to be
mine! Not yours!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Japanese Oaks about to begin, her
burning declaration cuts through the tense
atmosphere at Tokyo Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: All of a sudden...

text_block_list.name: Japanese Oaks Racer A
text_block_list.text:
...Y-yeah! I was gonna say exactly the same thing!
I'm in this to win it too!

text_block_list.name: Japanese Oaks Racer B
text_block_list.text:
So am I! Since my mom's generation, my whole
family's been working hard to win the Japanese
Oaks!

text_block_list.name: Japanese Oaks Racer C
text_block_list.text:
Try beating us before you start making
statements about Umamusume on the Triple
Crown tour!

text_block_list.name: Japanese Oaks Racers
text_block_list.text: We're not letting you take the throne!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: C'mon. Now things are starting to get exciting!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! That was pretty crazy. All those racers just
surrounded Sweep Tosho and gave her an earful!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
They sure did! It looks like everyone's even more
fired up than usual!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I feel like that magical girl's at the center of
something! Like there's some kind of movement
getting started!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Sweep... You're...
